hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Memory files loaded from memory/ directory. Read memory/user.md, memory/preferences.md, memory/decisions.md, memory/people.md for context."}'

hooks.prompt:
Review the conversation that just happened. Check if any of these memory files need updating based on new information learned during the session:

1. memory/user.md — User profile, experience, preferences
2. memory/preferences.md — Code style, architecture, tools
3. memory/decisions.md — Architectural decisions made
4. memory/people.md — People and repositories

Only update files if there is genuinely new information. Do NOT update if nothing changed. Read each file first, then edit only what's new.
